specDetail.description: Task management interface for tracking development work across projects. Feature is not yet implemented — currently shows only a placeholder heading.
parameters: Placeholder page with Tasks heading only
No task board, status tracking, or task CRUD functionality implemented

constraints: Feature not yet implemented — displays placeholder only
Todo tracking exists within AI agent sessions but not as a standalone feature

acceptanceCriteria.given: a user navigates to the tasks page
acceptanceCriteria.then: a Tasks heading is displayed as placeholder
